title: NovaCoreTempFix-421856
description: This is a project to provide fixed and back-ported version of NovaCore. Since the original author has been inactive and cannot be reached by any means and left unusable versions for a year, now I try to provide some.
body:
This is a project to provide fixed and back-ported version of NovaCore. Since the original author has been inactive and cannot be reached by any means and left unusable versions for a year, now I try to provide some.

This project fixed the not sifting problem in original project's 1.21.4 version. 

This project brings the backported 1.21.1 version from 1.21.4 version. So now you're able to play with ExNihilo: Sequentia under MC 1.21.1.

I don't guarantee any future updates so this will be kind of archived project.

The original project: https://modrinth.com/mod/novacore

My source code repo: https://github.com/LiuJiewenTT/ExNihiloSequentia-NovaCore
